sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111276" key="filo/laos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-λᾱος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111276.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving the people,</tr_> title of Asclepius in Laconia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:23:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.23.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
